title: [Nyessem, Watery Expanse]
description: A murky expanse of water, an endless pool, stretches an untold distance into a cavern of uncertain size.  A thin, off-grey fog hovers just over the pool, shrouding its surface.  Wide metal braziers hang from the cavern's ceiling, lighting the expanse in a faint amber glow.  At the water's edge, a long and warped wooden bench offers a place for repose.
